title: mentha spicata var. scotica
intro: Mentha spicata var. scotica, also known as Highland peppermint, is a variety of peppermint native to Scotland and Ireland. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce nausea, and calm headaches due to its high concentration of menthol and menthone. The health benefits of Mentha spicata var. scotica include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. This plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in aromatherapy and topical applications.
